description: Real estate data platform providing property details, valuations, sale and rental listings, and market analytics.

tools.name: get_property_by_address
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive property details including ownership, physical characteristics, and location information for a specific address.

address.description: The complete street address of the property to retrieve (e.g., '123 Main St, Austin, TX 78701').

id.description: The unique identifier for the property in the RentCast system.

address.description: The complete street address of the property.

city.description: The city where the property is located.

state.description: The state abbreviation where the property is located.

zipcode.description: The postal ZIP code of the property location.

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the property (may include half-baths as decimals).

sqft.description: The total living area of the property in square feet.

year_built.description: The year the property was originally constructed.

property_type.description: The classification of the property (e.g., 'Single Family', 'Condo', 'Townhouse').

owner_name.description: The name of the current property owner on record.

tools.name: get_property_valuation
tools.description: Obtain an automated valuation model (AVM) estimate for a property, including value range and confidence metrics.

address.description: The complete street address of the property to value (e.g., '123 Main St, Austin, TX 78701').

estimated_value.description: The estimated current market value of the property in USD.

value_range_low.description: The lower bound of the estimated value range in USD.

value_range_high.description: The upper bound of the estimated value range in USD.

confidence_score.description: The confidence level of the valuation estimate, ranging from 0.0 to 1.0, where higher values indicate greater accuracy.

valuation_date.description: The date when this valuation was calculated, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: search_sale_listings
tools.description: Search for active properties listed for sale within a specified city and state, with optional price filtering.

city.description: The city where the property is located.

state.description: The state abbreviation where the property is located.

min_price.description: The minimum listing price in USD to filter results (optional).

max_price.description: The maximum listing price in USD to filter results (optional).

listings.description: Collection of active sale listings matching the search criteria.

id.description: The unique identifier for the property in the RentCast system.

address.description: The complete street address of the property.

list_price.description: The current asking price for the property in USD.

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the property (may include half-baths as decimals).

sqft.description: The total living area of the property in square feet.

days_on_market.description: The number of days the property has been actively listed for sale.

tools.name: search_rental_listings
tools.description: Search for available long-term rental properties within a specified city and state, with optional rent filtering.

city.description: The city where the property is located.

state.description: The state abbreviation where the property is located.

min_rent.description: The minimum monthly rent in USD to filter results (optional).

max_rent.description: The maximum monthly rent in USD to filter results (optional).

listings.description: Collection of available rental listings matching the search criteria.

id.description: The unique identifier for the property in the RentCast system.

address.description: The complete street address of the property.

monthly_rent.description: The monthly rental price for the property in USD.

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the property (may include half-baths as decimals).

available_date.description: The date when the property becomes available for occupancy, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Retrieve aggregated real estate market statistics and trends for a specific ZIP code area.

zip_code.description: The postal ZIP code of the market area to analyze.

average_sale_price.description: The average sale price of properties in the ZIP code area in USD.

average_rent.description: The average monthly rent for properties in the ZIP code area in USD.

price_per_sqft.description: The average price per square foot for properties in the ZIP code area in USD.

inventory_count.description: The total number of active listings currently available in the ZIP code area.

days_on_market_avg.description: The average number of days properties remain listed before sale or lease in the ZIP code area.
